title: Pedro Opens the Way
description: On pages 0–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Perospero, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Chopper as The crew races back to the Sunny while Big Mom’s army and the hunger rampage close in.
scene: Pedro chooses sacrifice so the crew can escape, forcing everyone to keep moving through grief.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: danda

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: They're fighting a good fight, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thinned our forces more than I thought you would, to be honest.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: UWAAA AAAA AHAHA AHA!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Chapter!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Fufufu. Keep quiet.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What Merry Train of Thought led you to believe

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that you could ever hope to steal back this ship from us?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Uuuu ughhh... crap!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There is an ocean of difference between our strengths.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: - I- I can't... even... transform...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Free Chopper at once!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: you fool. It's over. Those who stand against me,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll turn into candymen and merci- lessly lick!

dialogue.speaker: Perospero
dialogue.text: The candy will cover you entirely.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It will seep inside your body!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Guu- HH!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It will take your breath away! You will write in agony!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Guu- Hi!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Chop- Per!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And in three minutes, it will kill you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's all it takes! Three minutes, and my sweet sweet candy- man corpse is finished!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Peroin J^

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: STOO- OOOP!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hahahaha! It's too late for regrets and tears!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I gave you a choice!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I said I'd let the two of you go!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm no candyman myself... you must have thought me sweeter than I am!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: And this island isn't that sweet either!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Chopper- Eeeeeer!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Kukuki! Start counting the seconds.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: WAA AH!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Perfect for a bunch of sugary pushovers like you two.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WAAAAH! Stop it! I don't wanna meet a sweet end!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ahaha- haha! I'll make candymen out of you and Liiiiick you!:) Perorin )

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 35 dialogue beats. The escape becomes a race to the Sunny, ending with Pedro’s sacrifice against Perospero.
